## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff of the Fieldguide client account to Gabrielle Brogan.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Handoff:** Gabrielle Brogan now owns the Fieldguide account, taking over content production and client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Client Focus on Accuracy:** Fieldguide prioritizes accuracy and up-to-date data for compliance topics, making rigorous research and proper sourcing essential.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**The Production Pipeline:** A 3-step process (Perplexity → Manual Outline → Atlas) creates direction-driven outlines that guide Atlas to generate high-quality, focused drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [**Phase 2 Meeting:** Aida Knezevic will lead the Phase 2 meeting tomorrow, reporting on early success (2 indexed blogs with clicks) and the CMS access blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Priorities

  - [**Primary Concern:** Accuracy and up-to-date data are paramount for compliance topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Example:** A recent draft cited outdated NIST data (Dec vs. Mar), which required correction.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Process Note:** Atlas can sometimes get confused by minor updates to compliance documents, requiring manual verification.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Sourcing Strategy:** Citing authoritative sources (e.g., NIST, financial guidelines) is a strength, not a weakness.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It demonstrates a rigorous, research-based approach that Fieldguide's internal content team values.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Feedback Loop:** Fieldguide reviews are slow due to internal sharing, but their overall feedback has been positive.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

### Content Production Pipeline

[Ife Adekoya demonstrated the 3-step pipeline designed to produce high-quality, focused content efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

  - [**Step 1: Initial Research (Perplexity)**](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Goal:** Generate a broad, SEO-focused outline.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**Process:** Use a prompt with the keyword, search volume, and audience from ContentOS.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**Step 2: Manual Outline & Direction**](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a direction-driven outline that guides Atlas effectively.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
          - [Refine the Perplexity outline using competitor analysis and Google's AI Overview to align with user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
          - [Structure the outline with clear "Section Objectives" and "Research Directions" instead of prescriptive content.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
          - [Add a 100–150 word count per section to prevent Atlas from writing entire articles within single sections.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
          - [For the conclusion, instruct Atlas to provide a value-driven CTA, not a summary.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [**Step 3: Draft Generation & Editing (Atlas)**](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Goal:** Generate a high-quality draft and perform initial edits.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
          - [Input the direction-driven outline into Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
          - [Adjust settings: change "Target Read Time" to "Target Keywords," set article length to 2,000 words, and limit hyperlinks to 2–3 words.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
          - [Use Atlas's "Ask AI" tool for edits, highlighting specific sections for best results (avoids errors like deleting the entire article).](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Handoff Logistics

  - [**CMS Access:** Awaiting access from Fieldguide's IT team.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Email Tagging:** Aida Knezevic will continue the Monday email tagging task until Gabrielle Brogan receives a Fieldguide email account.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [**Topic Approval:** Erik O'Brien will ask Fieldguide for more approved topics during tomorrow's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

      - [Report on early wins (2 indexed blogs) and the CMS access blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
      - [Request more approved topics from Fieldguide.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [Continue the Monday email tagging task.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [**Gabrielle Brogan:**](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Take ownership of the Fieldguide account and content production.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Implement the demonstrated production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xmaZnhSLC-kG38CEg-PzSr-Z3QYfNb9z?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
